topic: Experimental probability with replacement, express as simplified fraction
latex:
Samantha has a bag that contains apple chews, cherry chews, and lime chews. She performs an experiment. Samantha randomly removes a chew from the bag, records the result, and returns the chew to the bag. Samantha performs the experiment 20 times. The results are shown below:

An apple chew was selected 3 times.
A cherry chew was selected 15 times.
A lime chew was selected 2 times.

Based on these results, express the probability that the next chew Samantha removes from the bag will be cherry chew as a fraction in simplest form.
